description: Composable React loading indicators — grids, bars and dots driven by phase fields, motion envelopes and OKLab gradients. Zero dependencies, compositor-only animation.
rules: arrangement defaults to "line"; loop-only props (ringSize, aspect, squareness, stroke, align, and length/thickness on PulseDots) require arrangement="loop" first
Spread a recipe onto the component matching its element: recipes.typing.element is "dots", so <PulseDots {...recipes.typing.props} />
No CSS import and no provider are needed; components inject their one keyframe themselves
dim, restScale, progress and intensity are all 0..1
To make a loader react to an AI token stream, feed the intensity prop from useStreamIntensity()
